title: Google now lets you sign in to your account using a selfie video
summary: As the name implies, selfie video lets you capture a short video of your face on a mobile device or PC, which is then compared to an earlier video that Google keeps on file to confirm you’re the account owner.
caption: output/2026-07-23/google-now-lets-you-sign-in-to-your-account-using-a-selfie-video.txt
